source_file: THE REGULATION OF FINANCIAL PRIVACY- THE UNITED STATES VS EUROPE.txt
text:
35
   These abbreviations stand for the following: Fichier National des Chèques Irréguliers (FNCI), Fichier
National des Incidents de Remboursement des Crédits aux Particuliers (FICP), Fichier Centrales des
Chèques (FCC) and Fichier Bancaire des Entreprises (FIBEN). The data base of interest is the FICP.
36
   The predecessor of FICP was the Centrale Professionelle d’Information sur les Impayés (CPII),
administrated by the Association des Sociétés Financières (ASF). It was the subject of a declaration
before the CNIL in 1989, but it is not used anymore. This exchange ended in the mid-1990s.
37
   La Poste is a postal service provider in France, which also provides financial services.

42
                              THE REGULATION OF FINANCIAL PRIVACY
